title: ResolverCapsuleRecord
description: Architecture contract for a private resolver capsule — a governed grounding/resolution record. Held in Peak's controlled storage / resolver layer — NOT in this repository — and describes capsule metadata, not the raw client content. No capsule instances are committed to the repo. Resolver/AgentNet integration is intended future architecture, not implemented. No external or cross-client publication of client-derived capsules occurs without explicit governance approval.

owner_id.description: Identifier of the owning party (a Peak team/role, or the governing owner of a client-private capsule).

client_id.description: Client this capsule pertains to, where applicable (client-private scope).

engagement_id.description: Engagement this capsule pertains to, where applicable.

source_reference_ids.description: SourceSystemReference ids the capsule is grounded on.

evidence_ids.description: EvidenceReference ids the capsule is grounded on.

authorization_scope.description: The authorization governing use of this capsule.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of creation in controlled storage.
